subtitle.ja: 糸を二重にして、はじめの構えから始めます。右手の中指で、左手のひらの糸を1本だけ取ります
subtitle.en: Double the string and begin with it looped on both thumbs and little fingers. With the right middle finger, pick up from below a single palm string of the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 右手の中指の糸を半回転させます。中指は下を向きます
subtitle.en: Give the right middle-finger loop a half twist; the middle finger will point downward.

subtitle.ja: 右手の中指で、右手のひらの2本の糸を上からとり、中指を上に向けます。中指にかかっていた1本の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: With the right middle finger, move over and pick down the two palm strings of the right hand, then point the middle finger upward. The single string that was on the middle finger will be released automatically.

subtitle.ja: 右手の親指と小指の糸を全て外します。
subtitle.en: Release all strings from the right thumb and little finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手中指の輪に右手の親指と小指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the right thumb and little finger from below into the right middle-finger loop.

subtitle.ja: 右手中指の糸を外します
右手中指で、左手のひらの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With the right middle finger, pick up from below the palm string of the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 右手中指の糸を2~3回転ひねります
subtitle.en: Give the right middle-finger loop two or three twists.

subtitle.ja: 右手親指の糸を右手人差し指に移して完成です
subtitle.en: Transfer the right thumb string to the right index finger to complete the figure.
